option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <RelativeLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/bg" tools:context=".SongsFragment">
<androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="96dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/homeWelcomeRow" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:visibility="gone">
<TextView android:id="@+id/homeWelcomeAvatar" android:layout_width="32dp" android:layout_height="32dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_home_avatar" android:gravity="center" android:text="A" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/homeWelcomeText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/homeLogoutBtn" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:contentDescription="@string/account_logout" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="40dp" android:minHeight="40dp" android:padding="8dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_logout" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconTint="@color/text_primary" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Album" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/homeAlbumsRecycler" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="10dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Thể loại" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/homeGenresRecycler" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="10dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Top bài nhạc" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/homeTopRecycler" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="10dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Gợi ý cho bạn" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/homeRecommendedRecycler" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="10dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Theo tác giả" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/homeArtistsRecycler" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="10dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Tất cả bài nhạc" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/recyclerView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="8dp" />
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
</RelativeLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <RelativeLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/bg" tools:context=".SongsFragment">
<androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="96dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/homeWelcomeRow" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="4dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:visibility="gone">
<TextView android:id="@+id/homeWelcomeAvatar" android:layout_width="32dp" android:layout_height="32dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_home_avatar" android:gravity="center" android:text="A" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/homeWelcomeText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/homeLogoutBtn" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:contentDescription="@string/account_logout" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="40dp" android:minHeight="40dp" android:padding="8dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_logout" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconTint="@color/spotify_green" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/homeGuestBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_status_card" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp" android:visibility="gone">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/library_guest_message" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="13sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/homeLoginBtn" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="@string/auth_login" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Album" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/homeAlbumsRecycler" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="10dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Thể loại" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/homeGenresRecycler" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="10dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Top bài nhạc" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/homeTopRecycler" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="10dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Gợi ý cho bạn" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/homeRecommendedRecycler" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="10dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Theo tác giả" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/homeArtistsRecycler" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="10dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:text="Tất cả bài nhạc" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/recyclerView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:paddingBottom="8dp" />
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
</RelativeLayout>
